flashcards.definition: Total assets minus total liabilities; your financial 'score' — track it quarterly to measure progress.
50% needs (rent, food, insurance), 30% wants (entertainment, dining), 20% savings/debt payoff.
Debt payoff strategy: pay minimums on all debts, put extra money toward the HIGHEST interest rate debt first.
Debt payoff strategy: pay off smallest balances first for psychological wins (higher total interest cost than avalanche).
Legal documents ensuring your assets are distributed according to your wishes: will, beneficiaries, POA, healthcare directive.
